eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Washington; at 2:06 PM on AUG 27, 2019 Effective until 3:06 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is an activation of the AMBER Alert System.  We have just received this important information regarding Timothy Cooper abducted child in Ocean Shores, Washington, Grays Harbor County.  The Ocean Shores Police Department is looking for a child who was taken by his non-custodial father from his grandparents home during a heated argument after threats to abscond with the child. The father has a history of suicidal attempts and threats as well as reported and untreated mental health issues. This incident occurred this morning at 10:40am. The child's name is Timothy Cooper he is a 5-year-old, Caucasian male with brown hair and hazel eyes.  He is 3 feet tall and 6 inches, weighing 50 pounds.  Suspect is Thomas Cooper, he is a Caucasian male has brown hair, brown eyes, is 5 feet 6 inches and 165 pounds. They may be traveling in a silver two thousand one EXTERRA Nissan license plate number B Q R 9 5 6 7. If you have any information on the whereabouts of this child, please call the Ocean Shores Police Department at 360-289-3331 or 9 1 1 immediately. This concludes the Amber Alert System message.
